micro: Roll your neck slowly — left, then right
Align your shoulders over your hips
Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds
Drop your shoulders away from your ears
Soften your eyes — blink slowly five times
Press your tongue to the roof of your mouth, relax
light: Standing back extension — hands on hips, arch back
Twist your spine left, then right — slow
Stand up and reach for the ceiling — hold 10s
Forward fold — let your head hang for 15 seconds
